accurate.why: All claims are supported by the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the resolution's purpose as disapproving the D.C. policing reform act.

changes_to_existing_law.why: No amendment to existing federal law.

effective_dates.why: No specific effective date in the bill beyond enactment.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the single operative provision of disapproval.

concise.why: Somewhat longer than needed, reiterating procedural details for a straightforward disapproval resolution.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names the D.C. act, its number, and the relevant committees.

correct_figures.why: Dates January 19, January 26, April 19, and April 20 all match the bill text.
